items.title: Review and listening
items.body:
Final practice for this workbook lesson. Listen, repeat, and review vocabulary.

Examples:
• I buy I sell
• I want to buy a house I want to sell my bicycle
• I want to buy a new house I need to sell my stor e
• I want to buy a car I want to sell my house
• I want to buy a new car I need to sell my car

items.text: I want to buy a newdress I need to sell my book
I have one brother and two sister My name is John
I have eight cousins Nice to meet you
I need to buy twelve books this year. Nice to meet you, too.

items.prompt: Review: put the sentence in order.
Review: put the sentence in order.
items.answer: I want to buy a house I want to sell my bicycle

items.prompt: Review: put the sentence in order.
items.answer: I want to buy a new house I need to sell my stor e
